page_metadata.biotools__summary: A web-based tool for the generation and visualization of phylogenetic profiles across Eukarya. It exploits 120 available eukaryotic genome sequences to allow users to visualize the evolutionary trajectories of defined subsets of model organism genes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A web-based tool for the generation and visualization of phylogenetic profiles across Eukarya. It exploits 120 available eukaryotic genome sequences to allow users to visualize the evolutionary trajectories of defined subsets of model organism genes.
